input.symptom: elevated output-schema validation failures on recent runs
input.fix_action: Redeploy the agent's pinned prompt and schema bundle.

input.cause: provider slowness against an undersized call timeout
input.fix_action: Raise the call timeout and enable the fallback model.

expected.summary: router-bot healed after the timeout was raised and the fallback model enabled.
